name: Lobster Fondue Dip
recipeIngredient: 5 ounces Lobster, cut into small pieces (canned lobster can be used if fresh; ensure it is well drained)
recipeInstructions:
1. Serve the hot cheese dip with crisp crackers for dipping.
2. Melt butter in a pan over low heat.
3. Gradually add and stir in the shredded Cheddar until melted.
- The cheese and butter mixture may appear separated.
4. Add red pepper sauce; stir to combine.
5. Slowly incorporate the white wine, stirring until the mixture is smooth.
6. Add the lobster pieces, stirring until heated through.
7. Makes about 1 1/2 cups.
